name: axon
description: User-owned workflow layer for Codex with composable skills, hooks, and history.

interface.shortDescription: User-owned workflow.md plus composable skills, hooks, and history
interface.longDescription: A user-owned workflow layer for Codex. Axon provides composable lifecycle skills, root-level workflow.md support, lightweight runtime hooks, workflow history, and create-hook for project-aware automation. Skills are helpers, not a forced sequence; the user's workflow remains the source of truth.
